items.title: INTO THE AM Cool Graphic T-Shirts for Men S - 4XL Premium Quality Unique Graphic Art Tees
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: into, shirts, 4xl, premium, quality, unique, art, tees. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
